title.en: This supreme immeasurable body secret technique...

content.en:
This supreme immeasurable body secret technique is called the Infinite Body!

"The Infinite Body, the Great Ancestor of Youhe should not have practiced this Infinite Body, it is rumored that the Great Ancestor of Youhe is practicing the Infinite Body Secret Technique called the Body of the Hidden River, which is a Medium Multiplication of the Immeasurable Body Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, this time, he had never seen the body of the hidden river, and presumably this secret art had not been passed down.

After obtaining the Infinite Body, Ye Tian left the True Infinite Fog Tower.

Although a Dao Ancestor has entered the True Fogless Tower more than once, the second time to enter needs to be after the first year of hundreds of thousands of realms, and the reward for the second time is not much, almost negligible.

Therefore, ordinary Dao Ancestors would not come a second time, let alone Ye Tian!

After returning, Ye Tian began to study the immeasurable body secret technique of the Infinite Body.

"It's really hard to practice, not only is it incomparably mysterious, but the Infinite Body even needs specific resources!"

The Infinite Body needs the four materials of Shadowless Crystal, Mist Water Stone, Fire Spirit Divine Gold, and Void Shadow Water to have any hope of cultivating the Infinite Body.

But it's just hope, and the success rate of training is still very low.

The four resources of Shadowless Crystal, Mist Water Stone, Fire Spirit Divine Gold, and Shadow Water are extremely precious, and the number is too small, and one resource must be consumed if it fails.

You can imagine how many resources you have to consume before you can hope to practice!

"If it was before the copying talent was upgraded, it would have been really difficult for me to obtain these resources, but now it is not difficult!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Now that his copying talent has been upgraded, he can not only copy the immeasurable ancestral endowment, but also have one more ability, that is, to fuse all things.

This is also one of the abilities he discovered a long time ago.

He used to be able to copy everything, but now he can fuse everything, for example, he can fuse a bunch of ordinary materials into more advanced materials.

For example, the Shadowless Crystal is a high-grade material for the Shadow Crystal, and there is a very low chance of the Shadowless Crystal being born in the Shadow Crystal vein.

In other words, if you collect enough shadow crystals and keep fusing them, you will have the hope of fusing the Shadowless Crystals.

Shadowless Crystals are hard to collect, but Shadowcrystals are easy to collect!

Among the Shadowless Crystal, Mist Water Stone, Fire Spirit Divine Gold, and Shadow Water, there is only one material that seems to be unable to be fused, and that is the Mist Water Stone.

Ye Tian currently hadn't found a low-level material of the same attribute as the Misty Water Stone, nor could he find a replacement, so he had to find the Misty Water Stone.

However, with just the misty water stone, Ye Tian still had hope of collecting it, and the difficulty was greatly reduced.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to collect a large number of shadow crystals, fire spirit gold, and ethereal water, these three resources are not difficult to collect, and as long as they are constantly fused, they can form the three materials they need.

Of course, Ye Tian was also collecting misty water stones.

It's just that the misty water stone is not so easy to collect, so he plans to take the lead in fusing the other three materials.

......

Some forces led by Zhenshan sold the shadow crystals, so Ye Tian collected enough shadow crystals in a short period of time.

Then, he began to fuse the shadow crystals.

"Fusion!"

One by one, the shadow crystals began to fuse under the fusion ability of the replication talent.

As countless shadow crystals were fused, the quality of the shadow crystals was also constantly improving, and gradually began to transform.

It wasn't until Ye Tian fused millions of shadow crystals that an illusory spar appeared.

It seems to be in a dream, and it seems to be invisible, but it can be observed with the naked eye, but it is difficult to touch.

"The Shadowless Crystal, sure enough, it's really fused!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With this fusion function, he can obtain a large number of precious resource materials!

Of course.

Many materials are unique and cannot be fused at all, just like resources such as misty water stones and eternal flint stones, which cannot be fused.

There are only a small number of ore vein resources, and there are lower resources, so that they can be fused into more advanced resources.

And many of the resources that were suitable for the primary-level immeasurable lifeforms were almost all unique, so Ye Tian had no way to fuse them.

This time, three of the four resources that assisted in cultivating the Infinite Body could be fused, which was really Ye Tian's luck.

As time passed, Ye Tian fused into shadowless crystals.

However, since the number of shadow crystals was not endless, after Ye Tian fused dozens of shadowless crystals, he was unable to acquire enough shadow crystals from the True Mountain Territory in a short period of time.

And at this time, Ye Tian also received enough Fire Spirit Gold, and began to fuse these Fire Spirit Gold to form Fire Spirit Divine Gold.

In the end, he fused ten pieces of Fire Spirit Divine Gold.

Then, he began to fuse those ethereal waters again, consuming a large amount of ethereal water, which formed the six parts of the ethereal water.

this day.

The Misty Water Stone finally has news.

......

True mountain collar, the ancient city of martial arts.

This is an ancient city built by the Ancient Blood Clan, and although the Ancient Blood Clan is weaker than the True Clan, it is also very strong, with a middle-level immeasurable lifeform and a dozen primary-level immeasurable lifeforms.

And this time, Ye Tian obtained a piece of information from a deputy city lord of the Absolute Martial Ancient City, who was also one of the primary-level immeasurable lifeforms of the ancient blood clan, and this primary-level immeasurable lifeform possessed a misty water stone on his body.

So, Ye Tian immediately came to the Absolute Martial Ancient City.

Soon, Ye Tian saw this primary-level immeasurable life form, Jiang Jun Great Ancestor!

"I've seen Jiang Jun Great Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said very politely.

This was the first time he had seen this Jiang Jun Great Ancestor, but the aura on the other party's body was very powerful, and his cultivation was already very close to the level of a middle-level immeasurable life form.

Jiang Jun Great Ancestor was definitely the top primary-level immeasurable life form.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian felt that he should not be the opponent of Jiang Jun Great Ancestor.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, do you want to trade the misty water stone on my body?"

Jiang Jun Ancestor asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tianying said.

Jiang Jun smiled and said, "Xuanming Great Ancestor, you want to cultivate the Infinite Body, right?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The primary-level immeasurable lifeforms of the True Mountain Collar and the collection of misty water stones were almost all for the purpose of cultivating the Infinite Body.

Therefore, no one can guess.

Great Ancestor Jiang Jun said: "Great Ancestor Xuanming, if the Infinite Body is not so easy to cultivate, I have gathered a total of eighteen materials and practiced eighteen times, but I have failed. If you want to train into an infinite body, it's too difficult!"

"I want to try!"

Ye Tian said.

"If you want to trade the Mist Water Stone, it's not impossible, I need the Shadowless Crystal, the Fire Spirit Divine Gold, and the Empty Shadow Water, if you have three materials and have a surplus, I can trade with you. "

Jiang Jun Great Ancestor said this, Ye Tian decided that Jiang Jun Great Ancestor was afraid that there were a lot of misty water stones on his body, so there was no shortage of this material, but there were three other materials.

This is simply the best news for him!
